entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: International research organization focusing on crop-related research for food security

entities.name: CROP MODELING
entities.description: The use of mathematical models to simulate crop growth and development

entities.name: ECONOMIC MODELS
entities.description: Models used to analyze economic variables and outcomes

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC MODELING
entities.description: Modeling that integrates social and economic factors to analyze impacts and set priorities

entities.name: PRIORITY SETTING
entities.description: The process of identifying and prioritizing research or policy goals

entities.name: POLICY ADVICE
entities.description: Recommendations provided to policymakers based on research findings

entities.name: EX-ANTE IMPACT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of predicting the potential impacts of a technology or policy before it is implemented

entities.name: SCENARIO ANALYSIS
entities.description: A process of analyzing future events by constructing different plausible scenarios

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The specific arrangement and management of crops on a farm

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: A state of deficiency in food intake

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being extremely poor

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of the environment through depletion of resources

entities.name: RESOURCE-CONSTRAINED SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers who operate on a small scale and have limited access to resources

entities.name: IMPACT MODEL
entities.description: A global modeling tool used to assess agricultural and economic impacts

entities.name: FARM HOUSEHOLD BIO-ECONOMIC MODELS
entities.description: Models that integrate biological crop data with economic household data

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The interaction of biological, physical, and socio-economic factors in farming

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life for people

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The entire system encompassing the production, processing, distribution, and consumption of food

entities.name: CROP COMMODITIES
entities.description: Agricultural crops produced for commercial sale

entities.name: CROP-GROWTH MODEL
entities.description: A model that simulates the growth and yield of a specific crop
